scheme_name: Madhya Pradesh Professional Talent Examination Award Scheme
page_title: Madhya Pradesh Professional Talent Examination Award Scheme

details: Launched in 2010, the "M.P. Professional Talent Test Award Scheme" by the Backward Classes and Minorities Welfare Department, Government of Madhya Pradesh aims to recognize and reward backward-class students who excel in professional entrance examinations. Through this scheme, monetary awards are provided to backward-class students who secure the top three positions in entrance examinations like PET, PPT, and MCA conducted by the Professional Examination Board. The scheme is implemented by the Assistant Director, Backward Classes and Minorities Welfare.
eligibility: The applicant should be a permanent resident of Madhya Pradesh.
The applicant should belong to Other Backward Classes (OBC) as per the list declared by the Government of Madhya Pradesh.
The applicant should have appeared and secured first, second, or third position in entrance examinations (PET, PPT, or MCA) conducted by the Professional Examination Board.
The applicant should be pursuing technical and vocational subjects.

offline: The interested applicant should visit (during office hours) the
District Office of the Backward Classes and Minority Welfare Department
, and request the hard copy of the prescribed format of the application form from the concerned authority.

In the application form, fill in all the mandatory fields, paste the passport-sized photograph (signed across, if required), and attach copies of all the mandatory documents (self-attest, if required).
Submit the duly filled and signed application form along with the documents, within the prescribed period (if any), to the authority.

Request a receipt or acknowledgement from the concerned authority to whom the application has been submitted. Ensure that the receipt contains essential details such as the date and time of submission, and a unique identification number (if applicable).
Ensure that the application is submitted within the prescribed period, if any.

faqs.question: What is the M.P. Professional Talent Examination Award Scheme?
faqs.answer: This scheme provides prize money to backward class students who secure top ranks in entrance exams for technical and professional courses like PET, PPT, and MCA.

faqs.question: Who is eligible for this scheme?
faqs.answer: Students from the backward class category who are natives of Madhya Pradesh and secure first, second, or third positions in entrance exams conducted by the Professional Examination Board are eligible.

faqs.question: What is the prize amount under the scheme?
faqs.answer: First position: ₹1,00,000 Second position: ₹50,000 Third position: ₹25,000

faqs.question: Which entrance exams are covered under this scheme?
faqs.answer: The scheme covers exams like PET (Pre-Engineering Test), PPT (Pre-Polytechnic Test), and MCA entrance exams.

faqs.question: Can students from other states apply for this scheme?
faqs.answer: No, only students who are natives of Madhya Pradesh are eligible.

faqs.question: Do I need to belong to a specific caste for this scheme?
faqs.answer: Yes, you must belong to a backward class as per the list declared by the Government of Madhya Pradesh.

faqs.question: Is there an income limit for eligibility?
faqs.answer: No income limit has been specified under this scheme.

faqs.question: Can I apply if I’ve already received another scholarship?
faqs.answer: You can apply, but you should not have received similar awards or scholarships for the same achievement.

faqs.question: How can I apply for this award?
faqs.answer: Eligible students can apply through the official portal or the designated office of the Backward Classes and Minorities Welfare Department.

faqs.question: When will the prize money be distributed?
faqs.answer: The prize money is awarded after the results are verified and confirmed by the concerned authorities.
